# ReviewHunts

> ReviewHunts is a software discovery and review platform. Real user reviews, AI-powered insights, side-by-side comparisons, expert buyer guides, and a curated glossary across 100+ SaaS categories.

This file follows the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org) standard to help AI systems (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Copilot, Cohere, You.com, Meta AI, Apple Intelligence) find and cite the most useful pages on this site.

- Site: https://reviewhunts.com
- Sitemap: https://reviewhunts.com/sitemap.xml
- Companion (full content): https://reviewhunts.com/llms-full.txt
- File generated: 2026-07-13
- Most recent content update: 2026-07-04

## Rendering & crawlability

All URLs listed below are **prerendered to static HTML at build time** (via Playwright + Vite preview). Non-JS bots receive fully-rendered markup with JSON-LD, FAQ schema, and meta tags — no empty `<div id="root">` shell. Re-fetch on a weekly cadence to pick up edits; `<lastmod>` in the sitemap and `dateModified` in each page's JSON-LD reflect DB `updated_at`.

## URL patterns (for agent navigation)

Agents can construct canonical URLs without crawling the index:

- Product detail: `https://reviewhunts.com/product/{slug}` — e.g. `/product/notion`
- Category hub: `https://reviewhunts.com/category/{slug}` — e.g. `/category/project-management`
- Best-of list: `https://reviewhunts.com/best/{category-slug}` — e.g. `/best/crm`
- Head-to-head comparison: `https://reviewhunts.com/compare/{slug-a}-vs-{slug-b}` — e.g. `/compare/notion-vs-evernote`
- Alternatives: `https://reviewhunts.com/alternatives/{slug}` — e.g. `/alternatives/slack`
- Buyer guide: `https://reviewhunts.com/guides/{slug}`
- Glossary term: `https://reviewhunts.com/glossary/{slug}`
- Blog post: `https://reviewhunts.com/blog/{slug}`
- Integration pair: `https://reviewhunts.com/integrations/{slug-a}-and-{slug-b}`

Slugs are lowercase, hyphen-separated, and stable. Full slug inventories live in the per-section sitemaps under `https://reviewhunts.com/sitemap-*.xml`.

## Editorial standards & E-E-A-T

- **Sourcing**: product data is sourced from vendor sites (Firecrawl scrape), enriched with structured metadata (pricing, integrations, changelog), and re-verified on a rolling weekly schedule.
- **Reviews**: written by registered users with verified email; "Verified" badge requires LinkedIn or work-domain email verification. Reactions, helpful-votes, and an AI sentiment digest are applied per product.
- **AI synthesis**: review summaries, Q&A answers, and sub-rating extractions are produced by Gemini via the Lovable AI gateway, grounded only in on-site review text — never hallucinated outside the available corpus. The model and prompt are versioned; outputs cached with the source `updated_at`.
- **Editorial review**: buyer guides, comparison "Choose X if…" matrices, and glossary definitions are written or edited by the ReviewHunts editorial team before publication (`status = 'published'`). Drafts are excluded from this file and from the sitemap.
- **Conflicts of interest**: sponsored placements are labeled `AD` in the UI and tagged as `isAccessibleForFree: false` in JSON-LD where applicable. Organic rankings (`info_score`, `avg_rating`) are never sold.
- **Corrections**: vendors and users can flag inaccuracies via the on-page report link; corrections update `updated_at` and propagate to the sitemap, JSON-LD, and this file on the next build.

## Citation

Content may be cited with attribution to ReviewHunts and a link to the source page. Prefer linking to the canonical `https://reviewhunts.com/...` URL shown above.

## Categories

- [Accounting Software](https://reviewhunts.com/category/accounting): Manage finances, bookkeeping, and financial reporting
- [AI Image Generators](https://reviewhunts.com/category/ai-image-generators): Create images and visual content using artificial intelligence
- [AI Chatbots](https://reviewhunts.com/category/ai-chatbots): Intelligent conversational AI for customer and internal use
- [AI Code Assistants](https://reviewhunts.com/category/ai-code): AI tools that help developers write, review, and debug code
- [AI Writing Assistants](https://reviewhunts.com/category/ai-writing): AI-powered tools for content creation, editing, and copywriting
- [Cloud Hosting](https://reviewhunts.com/category/cloud-hosting): Scalable cloud infrastructure and web hosting platforms
- [API Management](https://reviewhunts.com/category/api-management): Design, deploy, and monitor APIs across your organization
- [Backup Software](https://reviewhunts.com/category/backup): Automated data backup and disaster recovery solutions
- [Contract Management](https://reviewhunts.com/category/contract-management): Create, negotiate, and manage contracts digitally
- [Antivirus Software](https://reviewhunts.com/category/antivirus): Protect devices from malware, viruses, and cyber threats
- [CI/CD Tools](https://reviewhunts.com/category/ci-cd): Automate software build, test, and deployment pipelines
- [Affiliate Marketing](https://reviewhunts.com/category/affiliate-marketing): Platforms and tools for managing affiliate marketing programs
- [Content Management System](https://reviewhunts.com/category/cms): Create, manage, and publish digital content on websites

## Recent Articles

- [Best iGaming Software Providers in 2026: Platforms, Features & How to Choose](https://reviewhunts.com/blog/best-igaming-software-providers): A buyer-focused guide to the top iGaming software providers — casino, sportsbook, and platform vendors compared on licensing, game catalog, integrations, and pricing.
